elements.original_description: A frustrated cartoon person sitting at a cluttered desk with bills and a calculator, looking stressed. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist cartoon style, a frustrated cartoon person sitting at a cluttered wooden desk, scattered bills and a calculator on the desk, stressed expression with furrowed brows and slumped shoulders, clean flat vector art, high contrast, pure white background, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks, lighting conveys a tense, overwhelmed mood.
